title: ANC - Switch from Transparency Mode to ANC Mode
scenario: ANC mode retains previously selected level and Transparency Mode sub-setting is greyed out/disabled when switching from Transparency Mode to ANC Mode
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name].
3. Go to Audio Settings → ANC / Transparency Mode.
4. Tap on Transparency Mode to enable it.
5. Within Transparency Mode, select a sub-setting (e.g., Environment or Speech).
6. Verify that Transparency Mode is active and the selected sub-setting (Environment or Speech) is highlighted/enabled.
7. Tap on ANC Mode to switch from Transparency Mode to ANC Mode.
8. Observe the ANC Mode state and the Transparency Mode state.
expected: ANC Mode turns ON with the previously selected ANC value (e.g., High, Low, Adaptive). Transparency Mode switches OFF, and its previously selected sub-setting (Environment or Speech) is greyed out/disabled.
